art_direction: Editorial & Magazine Inspired - Awwwards Style Restaurant Experience

headings.usage: Use for Hero heading, category titles, section headers, and manifesto chapters. Use italic selectively for editorial flair.

body.usage: Use for menu descriptions, prices, navigation, and UI elements. High legibility.

layouts.container: Max-width of 1440px with generous padding (px-6 md:px-12 lg:px-24) to frame the content like a magazine page.
layouts.hero: Full viewport height (100vh). Flex layout, content heavily centered or bottom-aligned. Large typography with masked line-by-line reveal.
layouts.navigation: Sticky, top-0, z-50. Glassmorphism effect on scroll. Horizontal scrollable list on mobile (hide scrollbar) and elegant inline list on desktop.
layouts.menu_grid: CSS Grid: 1 column on mobile (100% width), 2 columns on tablet, 2 or 3 columns on desktop. Use generous gaps (gap-8 md:gap-12).
layouts.menu_card: Flex row for desktop (image left, content right), flex col for mobile (image top, content bottom). Avoid heavy shadows; use a 1px delicate border (border-[#D1CCC2]) or no border with subtle background on hover.

motion.smooth_scroll: Lenis library for smooth momentum scrolling.
motion.hero_reveal: Framer Motion: Masked line-by-line reveal for 'Arı Köşk' text. `initial={{ y: '100%', opacity: 0 }}` to `animate={{ y: 0, opacity: 1 }}` with stagger.
motion.scroll_reveal: Framer Motion: Fade up and slight translate-y on scroll into view for menu categories and items. `whileInView={{ opacity: 1, y: 0 }}`.
motion.hover_states: Menu Cards: Image zooms slightly (`scale-105`) within a clipped frame on hover. Background tint shifts slightly.
motion.parallax: Subtle parallax on the hero background image or a 3D float effect on a prominent dish image.
motion.marquee: Slow editorial marquee for 'Pide & Kebap & Lahmacun - Odun Ateşinde Lezzet' using `react-fast-marquee`. Low contrast or outline typography.

visual_enhancers.images: Spotlight treatment. Real product photography treated deliberately. Use clipped frames with varied aspect ratios (e.g., 3:4 portrait or 16:9 landscape) to mimic editorial spreads.
visual_enhancers.manifesto: Numbered chapters (01, 02, 03). Use massive typography for numbers paired with small, crisp body text.
visual_enhancers.borders: Use 1px solid lines to separate sections and create a grid-like, structured editorial layout.

components.badges: Pill-shaped, uppercase, tracking-widest, text-[10px] or text-xs.
components.buttons: Pill-shaped or sharp rectangular. Primary button: deep charcoal background, bone-white text. Hover: subtle scale and background shift to accent color.
components.search_bar: Minimalist underline input. No heavy borders. Placeholder text in elegant serif or clean sans.
components.qr_modal: Backdrop blur (glassmorphism). Clean white/bone container. Centered QR code and elegant 'Share Menu' text.

accessibility.contrast: Ensure primary text (#1A1A1A) on background (#F7F5F0) exceeds APCA/WCAG ratios. Accent colors on light background should be legible.
accessibility.focus: All interactive elements must have a visible focus ring (focus:ring-2 focus:ring-[#C44100]).
accessibility.aria: Use aria-labels for navigation, search inputs, and modal triggers.
accessibility.motion: Respect prefers-reduced-motion media query to disable Lenis and Framer Motion effects for applicable users.

instructions_to_main_agent: You are building an Awwwards-style Single Page Application for a digital restaurant menu.
Use framer-motion extensively for scroll reveals, text masking, and micro-interactions.
Implement @studio-freight/lenis or lenis for smooth momentum scrolling.
Ensure the hero section features a kinetic masked line-by-line text reveal of 'Arı Köşk'.
The sticky navigation must be horizontally scrollable on mobile (hide scrollbar) and elegantly designed.
Include a dynamic search bar that filters menu items instantly.
Build an Admin panel for CRUD operations with MongoDB backend. Default dummy data for Arı Köşk should be pre-seeded.
Include a 'Share Menu' button that opens a Modal with a QR Code.
Create a slow editorial marquee section (e.g., 'Pide & Kebap & Lahmacun').
Create a numbered manifesto section with large, beautiful typography describing the restaurant philosophy.
Do NOT use HTML `<select>` or `<input type="date">`. Use custom components if needed.
All interactive elements MUST include `data-testid` attributes (e.g., `data-testid="category-tab-kebap"`).
Follow standard Javascript/React practices. Ensure components are .jsx or .js (as per project setup, .js files are used).
UNIVERSAL_GUIDELINES_FOR_MAIN_AGENT: Do not converge toward generic 'AI slop' frontend design.
Avoid generic centered layouts and simplistic gradients.
Create depth through layered design elements, z-index hierarchy, and subtle shadows/borders.
Use glassmorphism selectively and ensure text over it is legible (do not use fully transparent overlays).
Do NOT apply `transition: all`. Target specific properties.
Use 2-3x more spacing (Tailwind p-8, p-12, py-24) than feels comfortable to achieve a premium editorial feel.
Every interaction needs a micro-animation (hover state, focus state).
Use the specific Unsplash/Pexels image URLs provided in the guidelines. Never use placeholder text or dummy image URLs.
Prioritize optical alignment over geometric alignment.
